[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001110110 5
1 001101010 4
2 011110010 5
3 001011101 5
4 111100100 5
5 101110111 7
6 100101110 5
7 001110100 4

56 65 001011101 5 match 3
67 76 111100100 5 match 4
70 07 101110111 7 match 5
